backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the full backend for Aditi Electricals, including user profiles, workers, attendance records, 2PM confirmations, notes, salary records, and announcements, with access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Stub migration module that runs a no-op transformation, returning an empty record.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three completed frontend features: fixing owner role to 'owner', restoring a light blue/white visual theme, and removing the logo from the header.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details across the React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, card, border, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PWA with Inter font, manifest link, apple touch icon, theme color meta tags, and the React root div.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for Aditi Electricals defining app name, icons, standalone display mode, and a light blue theme color.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker handling static asset caching for offline support, network-first fetch strategy, and push notification display with click-to-focus behavior.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component providing QueryClient and AuthProvider, routing between owner pages (with workerId params) and worker pages based on authenticated user role.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceCalend: Renders a monthly attendance calendar grid with color-coded status indicators (present, absent, leave, holiday) and supports clickable dates for owners to add/edit records.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky app header with role-based navigation (owner vs. worker), a desktop nav bar, mobile hamburger menu, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/notes/AddNoteMod: Modal form for creating a new note with type selection, content input, optional photo upload with progress tracking, and role-based worker/type options.
frontend/src/components/notes/EditNoteMo: Modal form for editing an existing note's content and photo, supporting replacement or removal of the existing photo with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/notes/NoteCard.t: Displays a single note with its type badge, content, optional photo, author, timestamp, and role-based edit/delete action buttons.
frontend/src/components/owner/AddWorkerM: A modal dialog form for adding a new worker with name, mobile, and salary fields, using the useAddWorker mutation hook and displaying success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/owner/Announceme: A modal for managing announcements that supports creating, editing, and deleting announcements with inline form and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/owner/EditWorker: A modal dialog for editing an existing worker's name, mobile, salary, and active status, pre-populated from the worker prop and using the useUpdateWorker mutation.
frontend/src/components/PINChangeModal.t: Modal dialog for changing a worker's or owner's PIN, supporting both self-service and owner-initiated PIN changes with validation and error feedback.
frontend/src/components/salary/SalaryBre: A card component that displays a detailed salary breakdown for a given SalaryRecord, computing deductions, cut amounts, and net pay with highlighted rows.
frontend/src/components/worker/TwoPMConf: A fullscreen popup that appears after 2 PM prompting the worker to confirm they have resumed work, polling every minute and calling the confirmTwoPM mutation on confirmation.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context with login/logout logic for both an owner (hardcoded credentials) and workers (matched against a provided list), persisting session in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend canister interactions including CRUD operations for workers, attendance records, notes, salary records, announcements, and 2PM confirmations. Each hook wraps actor calls with appropriate query keys and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS that defines CSS custom properties for a light-blue/white theme (with dark mode variants) covering colors, radius, and shadows. Also adds utility classes for page background, header, and card shadows.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page component that accepts an Employee ID and PIN, validates them against fetched worker data, and calls the auth context's login function. Displays loading and error states with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/pages/owner/AttendanceManag: Owner page for managing worker attendance records with a monthly calendar view, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via dialogs and confirmation prompts. Uses worker selection and month/year navigation to filter and display attendance.
Owner dashboard displaying today's attendance summary stats (total, present, absent, 2PM confirmations) and current month salary info using cards and badges. Fetches worker, attendance, confirmation, and salary data with auto-refresh every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/pages/owner/OwnerNotes.tsx: Owner-facing notes management page that displays, filters, and deletes notes categorized by type (work, material, ownerInstruction, perWorker), with modals for adding, editing, and sending announcements.
frontend/src/pages/owner/SalaryManagemen: Salary management page for owners to view, create, and update monthly salary records per worker, with fields for deductions, advances, carry-forward, and a manual override option.
frontend/src/pages/owner/WorkerDetail.ts: Detailed worker profile page showing attendance calendar, salary management, and notes in tabbed layout, with month navigation and overall attendance statistics.
frontend/src/pages/owner/WorkerManagemen: Worker management page listing all workers with options to add, edit, delete, change PIN, and view individual worker details, including active/inactive status display.
frontend/src/pages/worker/WorkerAttendan: Worker self-service attendance page that allows marking today's attendance within a time window, displays a monthly calendar of records, and shows present/absent/leave counts.
frontend/src/pages/worker/WorkerDashboar: Worker dashboard page showing a greeting, today's attendance status, 2PM confirmation status, latest announcements, and quick-navigation cards, with a 30-second polling interval for time-window checks.
frontend/src/pages/worker/WorkerNotes.ts: Worker notes page displaying the authenticated worker's notes in tabbed views (All, Work, Material) with add, edit, and delete functionality via modals.
frontend/src/pages/worker/WorkerSalary.t: Worker salary page with a month/year navigator that fetches and displays the salary breakdown for the selected period, showing a placeholder when no record exists.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Utility functions for date/time operations including formatting dates and nanosecond timestamps, getting current month/year, computing days in a month, and checking attendance time windows.
frontend/src/utils/registerServiceWorker: Handles service worker registration, notification permission requests, and scheduling of daily push notifications (attendance and 2PM reminders) with vibration support.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and accordion animations, plus the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the full project state (version 5) for the Aditi Electricals PWA, including feature list, architectural notes, known issues (owner role mapping bug), and requirements for a role-based employee management app with attendance, salary, and notifications.
